title: Public–Private Collaboration in Crypto: VASPs’ Role | Regulation Day Devconnect Edition
description:
This panel explores the role of Virtual Asset Service Providers (VASPs) in shaping public policy, bringing together Manuel Beaudroit (Co-founder & CEO, Belo), Julián Colombo (South America Sr. Director, Bitso), Mykolas Majauskas (Policy Director, Bybit), and Connor Spelliscy (Head of Global Policy Strategy, Ethereum Foundation), moderated by Milagros Santamaría from Crecimiento. The discussion focuses on collaboration between regulators and industry, compliance challenges, and how VASPs can contribute to the design of effective, forward-looking regulatory frameworks.

This conversation was part of Regulation Day – Devconnect Edition, held during Devconnect 2025 in Buenos Aires. Regulation Day convened policymakers, regulators, founders, builders, and industry leaders to foster open dialogue around regulation, innovation, and the future of decentralized technologies.

Crecimiento is a global movement working to position Argentina as a leading hub for crypto and emerging technologies. Through community-driven programs, education, and dialogue between the public and private sectors, Crecimiento supports builders, founders, and institutions shaping the future of the ecosystem.
